name: Prime Auto Care
about: Prime Auto Care has been serving Pune's vehicle owners for over 10 years. We specialise in AC repair, engine diagnostics, and full-service maintenance for all 4-wheelers. Our certified technicians use OEM-grade parts and provide a 30-day service warranty on all jobs.

reviewsList.name: Rahul S.
reviewsList.comment: Excellent service! AC works perfectly now. Very professional staff.

reviewsList.name: Priya M.
reviewsList.comment: Quick oil change, transparent pricing. Will definitely come back.

reviewsList.name: Arjun K.
reviewsList.comment: Good work overall, slight delay but quality was top-notch.

name: City Bike Garage
about: City Bike Garage is Pune's go-to destination for 2-wheelers. From routine tune-ups to full engine overhauls, our specialists handle bikes, scooters, and EV two-wheelers with precision and care.

reviewsList.name: Sneha T.
reviewsList.comment: Super fast service! My scooter runs like new. Highly recommended.

reviewsList.name: Vikram P.
reviewsList.comment: Good mechanics, fair prices. EV bike serviced perfectly.

reviewsList.name: Meera D.
reviewsList.comment: Always reliable. Been coming here for 2 years, never disappointed.

name: Express Car Clinic
about: Express Car Clinic is Pune's highest-rated multi-vehicle garage. With 14 years of experience, we service everything from hatchbacks to SUVs, bikes to EVs. Our diagnostics bay is equipped with the latest OBD-II scanners.

reviewsList.name: Ankit R.
reviewsList.comment: Best garage in Pune! Diagnosed my car issue in 20 minutes flat.

reviewsList.name: Pooja N.
reviewsList.comment: Transparent billing, no hidden charges. Genuinely trustworthy.

reviewsList.name: Karan M.
reviewsList.comment: Handled my EV perfectly. Very knowledgeable team.
